title: Comfort Fabric Conditioner Ultimate Care Tropical Lily 58 Washes 870Ml
features: Ultimate Care Formula: Provides exceptional softness and long-lasting fragrance for up to 58 washes.
Tropical Lily Scent: Infuses clothes with a vibrant, floral fragrance of tropical lily that lingers.
Anti-Ageing Protection: Helps protect clothes from fading, shrinking, and bobbling, keeping fabrics looking newer for longer.
Easy Iron: Softens fabrics to make ironing easier and quicker, reducing time spent on laundry chores.
Color Protection: Helps prevent color fading and keeps clothes looking fresh and vibrant.
Eco-Friendly Packaging: Packaged with sustainability in mind, reducing plastic waste and environmental impact.
description: Product Description Enhance your laundry routine with Comfort Fabric Conditioner Ultimate Care in Tropical Lily , a powerful fabric softener designed to protect and refresh your clothes with every wash. This 870ml bottle provides up to 58 washes , making it an economical choice for any household. With Comfort’s ultimate care formula, this fabric conditioner not only offers superior softness but also provides anti-aging protection for your garments, helping to keep them from fading, shrinking, or bobbling over time. The vibrant fragrance of tropical lily infuses your clothes with a delightful, long-lasting scent that adds a fresh, floral aroma to each wear. Comfort’s conditioner also aids in color protection , ensuring that your fabrics maintain their brightness and look newer for longer. Additionally, it features an easy iron formula , softening fabrics to make ironing quicker and more efficient, saving you time and effort on laundry day. Dermatologically tested, Comfort Ultimate Care Tropical Lily is gentle on sensitive skin and safe for use on all types of fabrics, from everyday wear to delicate items. Packaged with sustainability in mind, this bottle not only delivers high-quality care for your clothing but also supports eco-friendly practices by reducing plastic waste. Bring softness, protection, and a luxurious tropical scent to your laundry with Comfort's Ultimate Care Fabric Conditioner, and enjoy clothes that feel as fresh as they smell. Ingredients 15-30%: Cationic surfactants. <5%: Perfume, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Salicylate, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, DMDM Hydantoin, Potassium Sorbate Directions Pour a 15 ml dose straight into the correct compartment of your washing machine drawer along with your favourite laundry detergent. Do not pour directly onto fabrics. Choose the right wash setting and let your machine take care of the rest, as it releases the fabric conditioner during the final rinse cycle. Manufacturer Contact Information Comfort, Freepost ADM1000, London, SW1A 2XX Unilever Ireland, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24. See more
